Description: Assets below the voltage threshold will not be considered (cable, line, generator, etc.).

True: the country name is set based on the extended country shapes.
True: line endings are added to the dataset of the substations.
Methodology to specify the name of generators. From OpenStreetMap (OSM) or named after the closest city (closest_city).

Method for selecting which type of data is used for substations in the clean_osm_data script.

Method for selecting which type of data is used for cables in the clean_osm_data script.

True: close buses are merged and guarantee the voltage matching among line endings.
Tolerance in meters of the close buses to merge.
True: lines overpassing buses are splitted and connected to the buses.
Tolerance to identify lines overpassing buses.
